```java
protected JsonToken _initForReading(JsonParser p) throws IOException {
    if (_schema != null) {
        p.setSchema(_schema);
    }
    _config.initialize(p); // since 2.5

    JsonToken t = p.getCurrentToken();
    if (t == null) {
        t = p.nextToken();
        if (t == null) {

        }
    }
    return t;
}
```
